scripts.build:extension: mkdir -p public/extension && cp extension/*.js public/extension/ && cp extension/manifest.json public/extension/manifest.json && cd public/extension && zip -r ../njudge-extension-chrome.zip . -x 'manifest.firefox.json' && cd ../.. && cp extension/manifest.firefox.json public/extension/manifest.json && cd public/extension && zip -r ../njudge-extension-firefox.zip . && cd ../.. && rm -rf public/extension
